# qbuem-stack

> Zero Latency · Zero Allocation · Zero Dependency — High-performance C++20 infrastructure library for WAS, IPC, and data pipelines. v2.3.0.

`qbuem-stack` is a header-centric C++20 library targeting ultra-low latency server workloads.

## ⚡ Extreme Performance Standards (Baseline)
- **IPC Latency**: < 200ns (SHM)
- **THROUGHPUT**: > 40M RPS (HTTP/io_uring/AF_XDP)
- **P99.9 Network**: < 10μs
- **Zero-Allocation**: 0 Bytes during Hot-Path

## Core Documentation

- [README](README.md): Project overview, quick start, 40M RPS benchmark targets
- [TODO / Roadmap](TODO.md): v2.3.0 status and upcoming milestones (v2.4.0 Primitives, v3.0.0 Ultimate Stack)
- [Feature Status & Advancement](docs/feature-status-advancement.md): Detailed audit and competitive analysis
- [High-Performance Primitives](docs/high-performance-primitives.md): Lock-Free Map, GenerationPool, MicroTicker
- [Network Optimization (Linux)](docs/network-optimization-guide.md): io_uring fixed buffers, multishot, AF_XDP
- [kqueue Optimization (macOS)](docs/kqueue-optimization-guide.md): udata O(1) dispatch, changelist batching
- [Pipeline Master Guide](docs/pipeline-master-guide.md): Complete reference for Static/Dynamic Pipelines and IPC adapters
- [SHM Messaging](docs/shm-messaging.md): Sub-microsecond IPC — SHMChannel, SHMBus
- [Usability Refinement](docs/usability-enhancement.md): Fluent Pipelines, C++20 Concepts, Automated DI
- [Library Strategy](docs/library-strategy.md): 9-level modular CMake build

## Reference Guides (Next-Gen)

- [Fetch Advancement](docs/fetch-advancement.md): Zero-copy streaming, HTTP/2 & HTTP/3 QUIC
- [UDP Architecture](docs/udp-architecture.md): RUDP, MMSG batching, Native Multicast
- [Ecosystem Expansion](docs/ecosystem-expansion.md): Advanced WAS, ReliableCast, Template engines
- [Strategic Evaluation](docs/strategic-evaluation.md): Why qbuem-stack unifies WAS + IPC + ML
- [DB Abstraction](docs/db-abstraction.md): Zero-allocation database driver interface
- [Security & TLS](docs/security-tls.md): kTLS offload, SIMD JWT, JwtAuthAction

## Examples Index
- [Examples Overview](examples/README.md): 44 categorized examples with learning paths

## API Reference
- [Public Headers](include/qbuem/): All public C++20 headers — umbrella at `qbuem_stack.hpp`

## Build & Test
- [Root CMakeLists.txt](CMakeLists.txt): Top-level build — C++20, optional qbuem-json
